name: auth-server-k6-load-test
description: k6 load tests for the auth-server

scripts.test:password-grant: start-server-and-test start:backend http://localhost:9001 "npm run seed && k6 run tests/password-grant.js"
scripts.test:authorize: start-server-and-test start:backend http://localhost:9001 "npm run seed && k6 run tests/authorize.js"
scripts.test:introspection: start-server-and-test start:backend http://localhost:9001 "npm run seed && k6 run tests/introspection.js"
scripts.test: start-server-and-test start:backend http://localhost:9001 "npm run seed && k6 run tests/health-check.js && k6 run tests/well-known.js && k6 run tests/password-grant.js && k6 run tests/authorize.js && k6 run tests/introspection.js"
